title: Supply Chain Manager - Maersk India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Maersk India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
